series_metadata.series_description: To expedite the delivery of divisional and departmental documents by facsimile equipment.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: The form is attached to the document that is faxed and is maintained for the same period of time as the attached document ; Microform: The form is attached to the document that is faxed and is maintained for the same period of time as the attached document, Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred
